title: SICSOE
description: sicsoe.fr zoominfo.com/c/sicsoe/359018881 SICSOE (Solution Vin Logistique) is a French wine logistics company based near Bordeaux, established in 1985. They provide comprehensive, customized logistics services for the wine industry, including winery operations, bottling, storage, and shipping. The company is recognized for its advanced technology ensuring full product traceability and its strong commitment to environmental and quality standards, including ISO 14001 certification
